title: Crispy Tibs with Crunchy Vegetables
description: A keto-friendly Ethiopian-inspired dish featuring crispy beef tibs and crunchy vegetables, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Beef (sirloin or ribeye), sliced into small pieces
Crunchy vegetables (such as bell peppers, carrots, and onions)

instructions: 1. Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the tibs spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add the crunchy vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Stir in the chopped cilantro and lemon juice.
